---
title: "Conteneurs & MicroVMs"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Conteneurs & MicroVMs

## Docker — Le standard

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Persistance | Volumes, images |
| Network | Bridge, custom networks |
| Écosystème | Immense (Docker Hub) |

```python
# Exemple: OpenHands sandbox (Docker)
import docker

client = docker.from_env()
container = client.containers.run(
    "openhands/sandbox:latest",
    command="python script.py",
    volumes={"./workspace": {"bind": "/workspace", "mode": "rw"}},
    network_mode="none",  # Pas d'internet
    mem_limit="2g",
    cpu_period=100000,
    cpu_quota=50000,  # 50% CPU
    remove=True  # Éphémère
)
```

## Podman — Daemonless, rootless

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | Namespace + cgroups (rootless) |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (drop-in replacement) |
| Rootless | ✅ (par défaut) |
| Pods | ✅ (Kubernetes-like) |

::: callout-tip
## Podman pour la sécurité
Podman tourne rootless par défaut, réduisant la surface d'attaque. Idéal pour les sandboxes d'agents IA qui exécutent du code non fiable.
:::

## Firecracker — MicroVM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | KVM-based MicroVM |
| Latence démarrage | ~125ms |
| Overhead | Minimal (~5MB RAM) |
| Sécurité | Isolation VM-level |
| Utilisé par | AWS Lambda, Fargate, Fly.io |

**Features** : Démarrage ultra-rapide, isolation forte (KVM), rate-limiting intégré, pas de device passthrough.

```python
# Exemple conceptuel Firecracker
# Nécessite l'API Firecracker
import subprocess

# Démarrer une microVM
subprocess.run([
    "firecracker",
    "--api-sock", "/tmp/firecracker.sock",
    "--config-file", "vm_config.json"
])
```

## Kata Containers — Container + VM

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | VM légère par container |
| Latence démarrage | ~1-2s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (via containerd) |
| Kubernetes | ✅ (CRI-O, containerd) |

## gVisor — Kernel sandbox

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Isolation | User-space kernel (ptrace/KVM) |
| Latence démarrage | ~2-5s |
| Docker compatible | ✅ (`--runtime=runsc`) |
| Overhead | ~10-20% perf |

## Comparatif

| Solution | Isolation | Latence | Overhead | Sécurité | Complexité |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|----------|------------|
| Docker | Container | 1-5s | Faible | Moyenne | Faible |
| Podman | Container (rootless) | 1-5s | Faible | Bonne | Faible |
| Firecracker | MicroVM | 125ms | Minimal | Excellente | Moyenne |
| Kata | VM + container | 1-2s | Modéré | Excellente | Moyenne |
| gVisor | User-space kernel | 2-5s | Modéré | Bonne | Faible |

::: callout-note
## Choix par cas d'usage
- **Dev local** → Docker ou Podman (simplicité)
- **Production multi-tenant** → Firecracker (isolation + vitesse)
- **Kubernetes enterprise** → Kata (compatibilité + sécurité)
- **Code non fiable** → gVisor ou Firecracker (isolation maximale)
:::

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_START -->
### [daytona](https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona)
Daytona is a Secure and Elastic Infrastructure for Running AI-Generated Code

⭐ 72.2k | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agentic-workflow`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-runtime`, `ai-sandboxes`, `code-execution`, `code-interpreter`, `developer-tools`

### [microsandbox](https://github.com/superradcompany/microsandbox)
🧱 easy, fast and local-first microVM runtime

⭐ 6.9k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agents`, `docker`, `golang`, `linux`, `local`, `macos`, `microvm`, `nodejs`

### [smolvm](https://github.com/smol-machines/smolvm)
Portable, lightweight, self-contained virtual machines.

⭐ 4.3k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `containers`, `crun`, `libkrun`, `microvm`, `rust`, `virtual-machine`

### [judge0](https://github.com/judge0/judge0)
Robust, fast, scalable, and sandboxed open-source online code execution system for humans and AI.

⭐ 4.3k | `HTML` | Licence: GPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agent-tools`, `ai-agents`, `ai-tools`, `code-execution`, `code-executor`, `code-runner`, `competitive-programming`, `online-compiler`

### [nono](https://github.com/nolabs-ai/nono)
Sandbox any AI agent in seconds - zero setup, zero latency.

⭐ 3.0k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent-sandbox`, `agent-security`, `ai-agent-sandbox`, `ai-agent-security`, `ai-agents`, `ai-security`, `ai-security-tool`, `code-execution`

### [piston](https://github.com/engineer-man/piston)
A high performance general purpose code execution engine.

⭐ 2.8k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `code-execution`, `lxc`, `nodejs`, `piston`, `shell`

### [microvm.nix](https://github.com/microvm-nix/microvm.nix)
NixOS MicroVMs

⭐ 2.7k | `Nix` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `cloud-hypervisor`, `crosvm`, `firecracker`, `flake`, `flakes`, `kvmtool`, `microvm`, `microvms`

### [forkd](https://github.com/deeplethe/forkd)
Fork() for AI agent microVMs. Spawn 100 children in ~100ms from a warm parent; BRANCH a live VM in ~150ms. KVM-isolated, snapshot CoW.

⭐ 2.7k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `copy-on-write`, `kvm`, `microvm`, `rust`, `sandbox`, `snapshot`

### [zeroboot](https://github.com/zerobootdev/zeroboot)
Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes for AI agents via copy-on-write forking

⭐ 2.4k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `code-execution`, `copy-on-write`, `firecracker`, `kvm`, `rust`, `sandbox`, `virtual-machine`

### [flintlock](https://github.com/liquidmetal-dev/flintlock)
Lock, Stock, and Two Smoking MicroVMs. Create and manage the lifecycle of MicroVMs backed by containerd.

⭐ 1.4k | `Go` | Licence: MPL-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `cni`, `firecracker`, `kvm`, `microvm`, `oci`

### [kuasar](https://github.com/kuasar-io/kuasar)
A multi-sandbox container runtime that provides cloud-native, all-scenario multiple sandbox container solutions.

⭐ 1.4k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `cloud-hypervisor`, `cloud-native`, `cncf`, `containerd`, `containers`, `cri`, `docker`, `microvm`

### [infra](https://github.com/e2b-dev/infra)
Infrastructure that's powering E2B Cloud.

⭐ 1.2k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `code-interpreter`, `consul`, `devtools`, `firecracker`, `gcp`, `go`, `golang`

### [ide](https://github.com/judge0/ide)
✨ Simple, free and open-source online code editor.

⭐ 1.1k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `code-editor`, `code-execution`, `code-executor`, `code-runner`, `online-compiler`, `online-editor`, `online-ide`, `online-judge`

### [mayastor](https://github.com/openebs/mayastor)
Dynamically provision Stateful Persistent Replicated Cluster-wide Fabric Volumes & Filesystems for Kubernetes that is provisioned from an optimized NVME SPDK backend data storage stack.

⭐ 1.1k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `containers`, `data-plane`, `k8s`, `kubernetes`, `microvm`, `nvme`, `pvc`, `rust`

### [tensorlake](https://github.com/tensorlakeai/tensorlake)
Tensorlake is a serverless runtime for sandboxes and deploying background agentic applications

⭐ 960 | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `code-execution`, `code-interpreter`, `llm`, `rl`, `sandbox`, `sandboxes`

### [secure-exec](https://github.com/rivet-dev/secure-exec)
Secure Node.js Execution Without a Sandbox A lightweight library for secure Node.js execution. No containers, no VMs — just npm-compatible sandboxing out of the box.

⭐ 929 | `MDX` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-08
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `code-execution`, `code-interpreter`, `llm`, `sandbox`, `sandboxing`

### [LiveCodeBench](https://github.com/LiveCodeBench/LiveCodeBench)
Official repository for the paper "LiveCodeBench: Holistic and Contamination Free Evaluation of Large Language Models for Code"

⭐ 904 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-08
**Tags** : `code-execution`, `code-generation`, `code-llms`, `code-repair`, `gpt-4`, `test-generation`

### [smolBSD](https://github.com/NetBSDfr/smolBSD)
smolBSD is a tiny BSD UNIX (NetBSD) system creation tool, primarily aimed at building modern, lightweight, fast micro VMs

⭐ 689 | `Shell` | Licence: BSD-2-Clause | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `bsd`, `microvm`, `netbsd`, `qemu`

### [llm-code-interpreter](https://github.com/e2b-dev/llm-code-interpreter)
[DEPRECATED] Powered by AI Playgrounds by E2B. Code interpreter on steroids for ChatGPT. Run any language, any terminal process, use filesystem freely. All with access to the internet.

⭐ 481 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-07
**Tags** : `ai`, `api`, `chatgpt`, `chatgpt-api`, `chatgpt-plugin`, `code`, `code-execution`, `code-interpreter`

### [anycall](https://github.com/kkent030315/anycall)
x64 Windows kernel code execution via user-mode, arbitrary syscall, vulnerable IOCTLs demonstration

⭐ 407 | `C++` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `cli`, `code-execution`, `device-driver`, `driver`, `drivers`, `kernel`, `kernel-exploit`, `kernel-exploitation`

<!-- TOOLS_SANDBOX_END -->
